sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107805" key="u(perph/dhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερπήδ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107805.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a leaping over,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.371b</biblScope> </bibl> codd. (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπεκ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
